description.value:
A massive, intelligent creature dwelling in deep caverns. Its main body is an enormous polyp. Its only attack is thrusting/flinging dreadful spines that impale mortal victims. Those killed are cursed to become undead servants. Extremely difficult opponent.

Special Abilities

  • Thrust/fling dreadful spines into targets
  • Curse victims to become undead servants
  • Use arcane abilities to capture or charm
  • Thick defensive membrane (absorbs 40 points of damage before penetration)
